text: {"claims":[{"statement":"A comparison of the distances to the Huanan Seafood Market of early Covid cases with known links to the market versus cases without known links shows results apparently incompatible with a location model lacking proximity ascertainment bias.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"A comparison of the distances to the Huanan Seafood Market of early Covid cases with known links to the market versus cases without known links shows results apparently incompatible with a location model lacking proximity ascertainment bias.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly reports the observed comparison result, indicating that the data do not fit a model without proximity ascertainment bias.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"The sign of the difference instead agrees with a model in which such ascertainment bias is large.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The sign of the difference instead agrees with a model in which such ascertainment bias is large.","entailment":"The quoted sentence states that the observed direction of the distance difference matches a model that assumes a large ascertainment bias.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"In the presence of such bias inferences based on the clustering of case locations become unreliable.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"In the presence of such bias inferences based on the clustering of case locations become unreliable.","entailment":"The quoted sentence claims that when proximity ascertainment bias exists, any conclusions drawn from spatial clustering are not trustworthy.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"}]}
